inputs.fcf_source: Mid-cycle fee + infrastructure owner cash ex treasury marks; marvin_floor = FY2025 adj EBITDA
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 adj EBITDA $33.7M ($0.18/sh); base normalizes fee/AUM growth and partial HPC cash flow

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 Adjusted EBITDA $33.7M on ~191M Class A shares (10-K)

blended_best.weights: 100% Marvin normalized base (no approved third party)
blended_best.notes: Filings-only blend; treasury marks excluded from owner-cash start

bear.notes: Crypto volume slump; HPC delays; treasury marks drag earnings

base.notes: Fee + staking revenue grow; Helios Phase I cash flow from H2 2026; marks neutral

bull.notes: Crypto cycle recovery + CoreWeave Phase II; GalaxyOne retail scale

segments.label: Digital Assets (Global Markets + Asset Management)
segments.evidence: FY2025 fees $159M + blockchain rewards $220M; Q1 2026 fees $22M annualizing; AUM $12.3B (10-K)

segments.label: Data Centers (Helios / HPC)
segments.evidence: No segment revenue FY2025; CoreWeave lease 133 MW IT load by H1 2026 (10-K)

segments.label: Treasury and Corporate
segments.evidence: Net loss on digital assets marks; corporate drag per segment note (10-K Note 24)

options.label: Helios Phase II (393 MW IT load)
options.base_terminal_rationale: P_base 40% on ERCOT-approved capacity + CoreWeave Phase II lease; not in Lawrence FCF start
options.evidence: 10-K: 600 MW gross for incremental 393 MW leased to CoreWeave

options.label: Treasury digital asset portfolio
options.base_terminal_rationale: Marks flow through earnings; excluded from Lawrence owner-cash — overlay uses fair-value sensitivity only
options.evidence: Q1 2026 digital assets $3.7B (10-Q); net gain/loss volatile

nav_overlay.notes: Total equity $3.0B includes treasury marks; not used as dhando floor

optionality_gate.notes: Low Lawrence IRR valid if HPC option matures; watch until fee path clears 15% bar

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Treasury digital assets marked to market; operating franchise not on balance sheet at fair value

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Data Centers pre-revenue FY2025; HPC capex drag until CoreWeave ramp

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Venture and fund stakes in Treasury segment; marks in digital asset gains

growth_explanation.mechanism: Fee and staking revenue scale with institutional crypto activity and $12.3B platform AUM; Helios HPC adds recurring lease cash from 2026; treasury marks excluded from base owner-cash path

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
